location: Guaranteed drop from a field-boss Tibia Mariner hidden on a small bluff on the Mountaintops of the Giants, between Castle Sol and the Snow Valley Ruins Overlook, on the plateau's northernmost ridge.
tactics: The Mariner sits on a small overlook halfway through the plateau's cemetery — easy to miss if you stick to the main path; head down the slope on the right from the northern ridge.
Tibia Mariners can raise nearby fallen skeletons to fight for them if the encounter drags on, so try to burst the boat/mariner down quickly.
This spot is close to a separate Death Rite Bird encounter — don't confuse the two fights when following directions.
Guaranteed drop on defeat, no farming required.
lore: Modeled after the black steeple of Helphen, a beacon said to guide the souls of the dead. Its glow resembles the light of a Site of Grace, but legend holds that only those who died in battle can actually see it.

builds.name: Strength/Intelligence Battlemage
builds.why: Splits damage between Physical and Magic with D scaling in both Strength and Intelligence, and its Ruinous Ghostflame skill adds bonus Frostbite/Magic damage for a hybrid melee-caster playstyle.
